//: Path: data/<ns>/worldgen/biome/<name>.json — a new overworld-style biome.
//1: Every field listed is REQUIRED — vanilla refuses to load a biome JSON missing any of them. Use this as the floor and edit only what you want to change.
//2: The 11 empty feature arrays correspond to GenerationStep.Decoration values (raw_generation, lakes, local_modifications, underground_structures, surface_structures, strongholds, underground_ores, underground_decoration, fluid_springs, vegetal_decoration, top_layer_modification). Add placed_feature ids to the right slot for your biome's content.
//3: Colours are 24-bit RGB packed as a single int (calculate via R*65536+G*256+B). The values below match vanilla 'plains'.
